name: select
title: Select
description: A custom listbox for choosing one option from a list. Use in forms or filters when the user picks a single value from a finite, mutually exclusive set — and you want a styled dropdown rather than the OS-native picker.

meta.docs: # Select A custom listbox for choosing one option from a list. Use in forms or filters when the user picks a single value from a finite, mutually exclusive set — and you want a styled dropdown rather than the OS-native picker. ## When to use - **Single-select form field** — compose `Select` + `SelectTrigger` containing `` + `SelectContent` with `` per option. - **Placeholder text** — `` shows until a value is chosen. - **Pre-selected default** — `` (controlled). - **Grouped options** — wrap groups in `` with a `` header; separate groups with ``. - **Disabled state** — pass `disabled` on `` companion or use a form library. ## Composition - The trigger is a `
